channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Belfast knife attack victim lost his left eye, court told, as suspect named as Hadi Alodid – UK politics live
item.description: Belfast knife attack victim lost his left eye, court told, as suspect named as Hadi Alodid – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Starmer should have no hesitation in labelling Musk a threat to democracy and national security rather than merely accusing him of “division”.
item.description: Starmer should have no hesitation in labelling Musk a threat to democracy and national security rather than merely accusing him of “division”.

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Streeting was the first cabinet minister to denounce “Unite the Kingdom” as a far-right march rather than a “free speech demonstration”.
item.description: Streeting was the first cabinet minister to denounce “Unite the Kingdom” as a far-right march rather than a “free speech demonstration”.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Burnham saying that we should look at banning the kirpan was further confirmation that the response to Starmer's failure will be 'what if we had the same soft left policies, the same equivocation, but with a more char...
item.description: Burnham saying that we should look at banning the kirpan was further confirmation that the response to Starmer's failure will be 'what if we had the same soft left policies, the same equivocation, but with a more char...

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: I don't know how Keir Starmer can wake up in the morning, see that pogroms have been taking place under his watch, that they are being fuelled by literal illegal activity on social media, and not make it his entire pu...
item.description: I don't know how Keir Starmer can wake up in the morning, see that pogroms have been taking place under his watch, that they are being fuelled by literal illegal activity on social media, and not make it his entire pu...

item.title: FT UK Politics: Northern Ireland battles to contain disorder after Belfast knife attack
item.description: Northern Ireland battles to contain disorder after Belfast knife attack

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Most Makerfield voters say offensive posts would put them off candidate, poll finds
item.description: Most Makerfield voters say offensive posts would put them off candidate, poll finds

item.title: i Politics: UK can’t afford a war… unless private investors fund it, insiders claim
item.description: UK can’t afford a war… unless private investors fund it, insiders claim

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Anti-immigration protesters in Belfast set bins and vehicles on fire amid unrest over knife attack – live
item.description: Anti-immigration protesters in Belfast set bins and vehicles on fire amid unrest over knife attack – live
